baseline.notes: Run 38's free_kick_shot gate regressed F1 to 0.385 (lost 3 of 4 TPs). Root cause: same as Run 37 trajectory failure — YOLO emits multiple per-frame ball-like detections (real + noise), and our aggregate statistics (position std, velocity vectors) treat them as one object. Run 38b reverts the free_kick_shot gate and fixes the root cause via ball-identity chain linking.

targets.notes: With coherent ball trajectories, Run #37's trajectory classifier should make physically-sensible decisions. Expect MISSED override to cut shot_stop_diving FPs cleanly (without the TP loss seen in 36b→37). 'Impossible ratio' rate = fraction of events with speed_ratio > 2.0; should drop from >20% in Run 37 to <10%.

notes: Run #38b — ball-identity chain linking. _extract_features now filters raw YOLO ball detections to one-per-frame via nearest-neighbor chain with max_speed=0.3 frame-widths/sec. free_kick_shot gate reverted (premise not testable with current pre-event camera behavior). Trajectory classifier (Run #37) still active — now operating on coherent ball positions rather than noisy candidates. Diag includes n_raw_ball_detections for before/after noise comparison.
